findings.action: Add to canonical registry or update architecture so operators know this flag is controlled elsewhere.
findings.evidence: flagRegistry.ts claims to centralize worker feature flags, but this launch-critical flag is not loaded/logged there.
findings.title: ENABLE_MCP_SERVER absent from worker flagRegistry
